offer: For freelancers using Upwork processing 5–15 timesheets/week, inconsistent tracking causes payment delays. We provide a timesheet consolidation app instead of manual tracking via spreadsheets.
problem: Inconsistent tracking of hours worked across multiple clients
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for freelancers seeking help
Indie Hackers discussions about time tracking tools
DM outreach to freelancers with demo video
Engage in community forums for freelancers sharing tools
try_it: Let users manually enter hours and view a simple dashboard
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: Create a landing page with one-liner and CTA
Produce a demo video of manual entry workflow
Conduct 10 short interviews with target users
Provide early-access onboarding for initial users
Share weekly progress updates in relevant communities
automation_simplification_ideas: Allow saving common inputs as templates
Set default reminders for tracking entries
Enable CSV import for existing timesheets
Facilitate one-click export of simple reports
